sub_problems: How are specific 'intervention pathways' in an LLM identified — pairs of (intervention site, downstream capability) — analogous to meridian-and-acupuncture-point pairs?
What is the right intervention vocabulary at each site — activation editing, attention reweighting, token replacement?
How do interventions at distant pathway points produce predictable downstream effects without disturbing other capabilities?
How is the pathway map maintained across model updates — does the cartography need to be re-derived for each fine-tune?
